'''√z-b-th''' ('''kazabath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:majoritize|majoritize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:majoritize|majoritize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √z-b-th
|-
! Lemma
| kazabath
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thizabath || jizabath || shizabath || kizabath
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuzabath || jujuzabath || shushuzabath || kukuzabath
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuzabath || juzabath || shuzabath || kuzabath
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuzabath || juzabath || shuzabath || kuzabath
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thezabath || jezabath || shezabath || kezabath
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothozabath || jojozabath || shoshozabath || kokozabath
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thozabath || jozabath || shozabath || kozabath
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thozabath || jozabath || shozabath || kozabath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zabath || zabath || zabath || zabath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zabath || zabath || zabath || zabath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zabath || zabath || zabath || zabath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zabath || zabath || zabath || zabath
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæzabath || jæzabath || shæzabath || kæzabath
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathazabath || jajazabath || shashazabath || kakazabath
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thazabath || jazabath || shazabath || kazabath
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thazabath || jazabath || shazabath || kazabath
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shazabath
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshazabath
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishazabath
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shazabathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshazabathnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishazabathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shazabathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshazabathnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishazabathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shazabathro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshazabathnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishazabathro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shazabathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshazabathnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishazabathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shazabathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshazabathnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishazabathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shazabathng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshazabathnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishazabathng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shazabathya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshazabathnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishazabathya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shazabathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshazabathnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishazabathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shazabathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshazabathnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishazabathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shazabathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazabathnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazabathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shazabathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshazabathnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazabathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shazabathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshazabathnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishazabathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shazabathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazabathnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazabathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shazabathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshazabathnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazabathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shazabathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshazabathnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishazabathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shazabathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshazabathnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishazabathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shazabathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshazabathnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazabathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shazabathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshazabathnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishazabathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shazabathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshazabathnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishazabathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shazabathmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazabathnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazabathmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
